package rulecoverage

import (
    "google.golang.org/protobuf/proto"
)

// Positive scenario for proto_unmarshal_same_payload_multiple_times: shows the risky shape for this rule.
// Rule intent: The same local protobuf payload binding is unmarshaled into multiple targets in one function.
type envelope struct { ID string }

func PositiveProtoUnmarshalSamePayloadMultipleTimes(payload []byte) {
    var first envelope
    var second envelope
    proto.Unmarshal(payload, &first)
    proto.Unmarshal(payload, &second)
}
